# Phase 4: LLM Tailoring and DOCX Generation Verification Report

**Phase Goal:** Every matched, queued job gets a tailored DOCX resume generated by Claude that provably contains zero invented experience, preserves the base resume formatting, respects the user monthly budget, and is stored as a versioned artifact.
**Verified:** 2026-04-12
**Status:** PASSED
**Re-verification:** No - initial verification

---

## Goal Achievement

### Observable Truths

| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|---------|
| 1 | User opens any queued job and sees a tailored DOCX that preserves base resume fonts, bullets, layout | VERIFIED | app/tailoring/docx_writer.py: replace_paragraph_text_preserving_format (L74-98) keeps first run formatting template. test_replace_preserves_run_formatting_bold (L623) and test_build_tailored_docx_preserves_formatting (L642) pass. Detail page at GET /tailoring/{job_id} renders preview via mammoth. |
| 2 | Hallucination validator rejects any tailored output containing a company/title/skill not in base resume | VERIFIED | app/tailoring/engine.py: validate_output calls LLM-as-judge on every tailoring attempt. test_invented_skill_rejected_end_to_end (L358) scripts 6 FakeLLMProvider responses, injects React in every tailored output, asserts success=False, retry_count==3, violation history preserved. |
| 3 | User never sees PII in LLM prompt logs - only bullets and skills cross LLM boundary | VERIFIED | app/tailoring/engine.py: strip_pii_sections (L89-144) drops contact header plus belt-and-braces regex redaction. test_pii_never_in_llm_prompt (L422) flattens every recorded provider call into one blob and asserts Jane Doe, email, phone, address are absent. |
| 4 | User can set a monthly budget cap and watch tailoring halt with clear UI notification when cap is hit | VERIFIED | app/tailoring/budget.py: BudgetGuard.check_budget returns can_proceed=False at 100% cap. pipeline.py breaks job loop on can_proceed=False. budget_widget.html.j2 renders red Tailoring paused banner when budget_halt=True. test_budget_check_halts_at_cap (L507) verifies guard logic. |
| 5 | Every tailored resume exists as versioned, downloadable artifact; prompt caching visibly reduces cost per call | VERIFIED | app/tailoring/service.py: resume_artifact_path(job_id, version). GET /tailoring/{job_id}/download/{version} streams via FileResponse. tailoring_detail.html.j2 (L154-178) displays cache_read_tokens and Estimated cache savings. test_tailoring_detail_template_shows_cache_tokens (L1131) verifies this. |

**Score:** 5/5 truths verified

### Requirements Coverage

| Requirement | Status | Notes |

| TAIL-01 (extractive-only tailoring) | SATISFIED | TAILORING_SYSTEM_PROMPT enforces extractive-only with LOCKED FIELDS; validator double-checks |
| TAIL-02 (LLM provider abstraction) | SATISFIED | LLMProvider protocol; AnthropicProvider; get_provider factory from Fernet vault |
| TAIL-03 (PII-safe prompts) | SATISFIED | strip_pii_sections + belt-and-braces regex; build_system_messages receives only sanitized text |
| TAIL-04 (hallucination validator) | SATISFIED | validate_output LLM-as-judge; retry loop; SC-2 test proves invented skill rejection end-to-end |
| TAIL-05 (format-preserving DOCX) | SATISFIED | replace_paragraph_text_preserving_format; run-level mutation only; SC-1 tests pass |
| TAIL-06 (HTML preview + diff) | SATISFIED | docx_to_html (mammoth); generate_section_diff; format_diff_html in detail template |
| TAIL-07 (intensity setting) | SATISFIED | settings_tailoring.html.j2; POST /settings/tailoring; intensity read by run_tailoring |
| TAIL-08 (budget enforcement) | SATISFIED | BudgetGuard.check_budget + debit; month rollover; 80%/100% thresholds; pipeline halts on cap |
| TAIL-09 (versioned artifacts) | SATISFIED | resume_artifact_path(job_id, version); versioned download routes live |
| SAFE-04 (PII never in LLM prompt) | SATISFIED | strip_pii_sections + regex redaction; test_pii_never_in_llm_prompt asserts on full provider call blob |

### Anti-Patterns Found

No TODO/FIXME/placeholder patterns, empty returns, or stub handlers found across any phase 4 implementation files.

### Human Verification Required

None. All success criteria are verified programmatically:

- Format preservation: proven by test asserting bold/italic runs survive replace_paragraph_text_preserving_format
- Hallucination rejection: proven by scripted 6-response FakeLLMProvider returning success=False
- PII absence: proven by blob-grep across all provider call payloads in test_pii_never_in_llm_prompt
- Budget halt: proven by unit test setting spent=cap and asserting can_proceed=False
- Cache savings visibility: proven by direct template file read asserting cache_read_tokens and cache savings text present
